subject: An armored black knight on a dark heavily armored mount charges forward with lance raised, red banner streaming, bearing down on a fleeing figure in the foreground
description: A knight in full black plate armor rides a massive dark mount — the creature is armored and spiked, its form large and imposing. The knight holds a long lance or spear extended forward with one arm; a large red-and-black banner or cloak billows dramatically behind. The mount is at speed, churning forward into the viewer's space. In the lower foreground, a smaller figure with visible hair is fleeing or falling, small and dwarfed by the charging knight. The sky is stormy and turbulent, clouds lit from below in blue-grey and gold tones. The overall palette is dark armor, red fabric, and a dramatic open sky.
foreground: fleeing or falling small figure with hair visible, lower left
background: stormy sky, blue-grey clouds lit from below, distant horizon
emotion: aggression, domination, pursuit; the fleeing figure conveys terror
